preview.summary: Back-to-back Asian champions Qatar open their first-ever qualified World Cup against a settled, defensively miserly Switzerland side. Expect Qatar to press with quick combinations while the Swiss control tempo through midfield and look to punish on transition.
preview.homeForm: Qatar qualified outright from AFC's third round for the first time and arrive as reigning two-time Asian Cup winners, ranked around 55th.
preview.awayForm: Switzerland won UEFA Group B unbeaten, conceding just two goals in six matches, and sit around 19th-21st in the FIFA ranking.
preview.homeKey: Akram Afif, Asian Cup star providing Qatar's creativity and finishing.
preview.awayKey: Granit Xhaka, captain and tempo-setter in his fourth World Cup.
storylines: Qatar's first match as an outright-qualified World Cup side
Switzerland's miserly defense vs Qatar's quick attacking patterns
Xhaka chasing a deep run after Euro 2024 quarter-final
preview.h2h: The teams have met rarely, with Qatar unbeaten in their limited previous encounters.
